import {Link, Outlet, useLocation, useNavigate} from "react-router-dom"; import {useCallback, useEffect, useState} from "react"; import {useDispatch, useSelector} from "react-redux"; import {clearMessage} from "../actions/message"; import {logout} from "../actions/auth"; import EventBus from "../common/EventBus"; import AuthVerify from "../common/AuthVerify"; const Layout = () => { const {user: currentUser} = useSelector((state) => state.auth); const dispatch = useDispatch(); let location = useLocation(); useEffect(() => { if (["/login", "/register"].includes(location.pathname)) { dispatch(clearMessage()); } }, [dispatch, location]); const logOut = useCallback(() => { dispatch(logout()); }, [dispatch]) useEffect(() => { EventBus.on("logout", () => { logOut(); }) return () => { EventBus.remove("logout"); } }, [currentUser, logOut]); return ( <>
{}
